description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wardrobe with a classic, paneled design and a smooth, painted finish. The front features two large, rectangular doors with subtle vertical paneling and small, round knobs as handles. Below the doors are four drawers, two on each side, providing additional storage space. The top and base of the wardrobe are accentuated with decorative molding, giving it a traditional and elegant appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the same painted surface and no visible hardware or openings. The wardrobe is likely constructed from wood, with metal hardware for the handles and drawer mechanisms.
description: A tall, classic paneled wardrobe with two doors, four drawers, and decorative molding, finished in a smooth, painted surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with round knobs and four drawers beneath, all framed by decorative molding.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat surface and the depth of the wardrobe, with molding visible at the top and base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat back panel with the same painted finish as the rest of the wardrobe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, highlighting the wardrobe's depth and molding details.
